name: Burn Your Bra Chicken Breast (a Tribute to the 70's)
recipeIngredient: 2 cups Tomato Soup (rinse cans with 1/2 cup water)
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the 4 chicken breasts in an electric skillet and lightly brown, turning once.
2. Mix all spices (except hot sauce) together and sprinkle over the chicken breasts.
3. Add hot sauce to tomato soup along with 1/2 can of water.
4. Pour the tomato soup mixture over the chicken, add olives, and cook for 1/2 hour or until the chicken is done.
5. Serve with a side dish of rice and vegetables.
